org.apache.dubbo.registry.client

类 AbstractServiceDiscovery

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.dubbo.registry.client.AbstractServiceDiscovery
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Comparable<Prioritized>, Prioritized, ServiceDiscovery
    直接已知子类:
    ConsulServiceDiscovery, EtcdServiceDiscovery, EurekaServiceDiscovery, FileSystemServiceDiscovery, MultipleRegistryServiceDiscovery, NacosServiceDiscovery, SofaRegistryServiceDiscovery, ZookeeperServiceDiscovery

    public abstract class AbstractServiceDiscovery
extends Object
implements ServiceDiscovery

    • 字段概要

      • 从接口继承的字段 org.apache.dubbo.common.lang.Prioritized

        COMPARATOR, MAX_PRIORITY, MIN_PRIORITY, NORMAL_PRIORITY

        Registers an instance of ServiceInstance.

        抛出:
